name: facepalm
slogan: Crosscheck console logs with chat history to troubleshoot issues intelligently.
description: FACEPALM analyzes OpenClaw console logs and chat history from a configurable time window, then uses an LLM (default: GPT-4o via OpenRouter) to diagnose and troubleshoot issues. All parameters are config-driven.
author: Austin

config.openrouter_api_key: Required: OpenRouter API key must be configured in OpenClaw platform settings
